stock.title: Stock
stock.description: Multi-location inventory ledger across Riccione, Amazon FBA, and per-channel allocations.
stock.empty.title: No stock matches these filters
stock.empty.descriptionDefault: Stock levels appear once products are imported and seeded.
stock.drawer.title: Stock detail
stock.bulk.transferHelp: Each selected row's available quantity (or full quantity if zero reserved) will be moved. Source locations are disabled.
stock.import.title: Import CSV
stock.import.description: Upload a CSV of (sku, change) rows to bulk-adjust stock. The change column is signed: positive adds, negative removes. Notes column is optional.
stock.shopifyLocations.title: Shopify Locations
stock.shopifyLocations.description: Map Shopify's per-location inventory model into Nexus StockLocation rows. Shopify is canonical for these rows: webhook updates flow into the StockLevel ledger via SYNC_RECONCILIATION movements; Nexus changes push out via the existing channel sync queue.
stock.shopifyLocations.empty.title: No Shopify locations mapped yet
stock.shopifyLocations.empty.description: Click Discover to pull every location from Shopify and create matching Nexus StockLocation rows. Idempotent — subsequent discoveries reconcile against existing rows.
stock.shopifyLocations.col.name: Name
stock.mcf.title: Amazon MCF
stock.mcf.description: Multi-Channel Fulfillment — Amazon ships FBA inventory to non-Amazon orders (eBay, Shopify). Inventory reserves at AMAZON-EU-FBA on creation; consumes on COMPLETE; releases on CANCELLED.
stock.mcf.empty.title: No MCF shipments yet
stock.mcf.empty.description: Operators trigger MCF from the outbound shipment surface. Once created, shipments appear here with live status from Amazon's SP-API.
stock.mcf.cancelConfirmDescription: Amazon may reject cancellation if the shipment is already shipped. On success, reserved units are released back to AMAZON-EU-FBA.
stock.stockouts.title: Stockout history
stock.stockouts.description: Every stockout event detected by R.12 — when it started, when (or whether) it closed, and the estimated lost units, revenue, and margin. Sweep runs every hour; trigger one manually if needed.
stock.stockouts.limitNote: Showing the first 200 events — narrow the filters to see more.
stock.stockouts.empty.title: No stockouts in this window
stock.stockouts.empty.description: Either inventory is healthy across this window, or the detector hasn't swept yet. Trigger a sweep to refresh.
stock.fbaPanEu.title: Pan-EU FBA
stock.fbaPanEu.description: Per-FC distribution across Amazon's Pan-European fulfillment network. Read-only — Amazon controls redistribution. Daily sync at 03:00 UTC.
stock.fbaPanEu.aged.title: Aged inventory (180+ days)
stock.fbaPanEu.aged.subtitle: {n} rows past 180-day LTSF threshold
stock.fbaPanEu.unfulfillable.title: Unfulfillable units
stock.fbaPanEu.unfulfillable.subtitle: {n} rows with damage / disposal candidates
stock.fbaPanEu.unfulfillable.footer: Resolve via Amazon Seller Central → FBA → Manage Unfulfillable Inventory. Disposal/return creates outbound shipments tracked in /fulfillment/inbound.
stock.fbaPanEu.empty.title: No Pan-EU FBA detail yet
stock.fbaPanEu.empty.description: Daily sync runs at 03:00 UTC; per-FC inventory rows appear once Amazon's getInventoryDetails endpoint is wired. Until then the aggregate AMAZON-EU-FBA StockLevel covers the basics.

stock.transfer.helpText: If the target location has no StockLevel row, one is created with the transferred quantity.

stock.reserve.heading: Reserve stock
stock.reserve.helpText: PENDING_ORDER reservations expire after 24h. Manual holds and promotions never expire automatically.

stock.bulkAdjust.changeHelp: Same delta applied to every selected row. Use negative numbers to remove stock.

stock.bulkThreshold.help: The reorder threshold per StockLevel overrides Product.lowStockThreshold for that location only. Clearing reverts to the product master.

stock.transfers.empty.description: Transfers between Riccione and Amazon FBA (or future locations) appear here once you move stock between them.

stock.reservations.empty.description: Reservations are created automatically when an order is ingested (S.2 reserve-then-consume), or manually via the per-product drawer.

stock.analytics.description: Stock turnover and Days-of-Inventory across the catalog. COGS computed from DailySalesAggregate; inventory value from current StockLevel × cost price.
stock.analytics.byChannel.title: Sales by channel

stock.deadStock.recommended.body: Markdown to clear margin-positive units · transfer surplus to a faster-moving location · scrap unsellable inventory via a WRITE_OFF stock movement (S.12 reason picker)

stock.eoq.title: Reorder recommendations (EOQ + ROP)
stock.eoq.formula.title: Formula
stock.eoq.formula.body: EOQ = √(2 × annualDemand × orderCost / annualHoldingCost). ROP = leadTimeDays × dailyDemand + safetyStock. Safety stock = Z × σ × √leadTime, where Z is derived from the configured service level (default 95% → Z=1.65).

pim.families.title: Product families
pim.families.subtitle: Akeneo-style PIM templates. A family declares which attribute groups + attributes apply to a product type, with required-vs-optional + per-channel rules. Children inherit from parents (additive — children can ADD but never remove or downgrade).

pim.workflows.title: Workflows
pim.workflows.subtitle: Salesforce-parity content-quality pipelines. A workflow is a configurable sequence of stages (DRAFT → REVIEW → APPROVED → PUBLISHED) attached to a family. Products joining the family land on the workflow's initial stage and progress through transitions. Distinct from product status — status is what the marketplace sees; workflow is the internal gate before publishing.

pim.workflows.create.col.label: Label
pim.workflows.create.stagesHint: Exactly one stage must be marked Initial. At most one Terminal. Publish is a UI hint — the workflow does NOT mutate Product.status; you flip status to ACTIVE manually after the operator confirms.

products.edit.workflow.commentPlaceholde: Leave a comment on this stage…
products.edit.workflow.historyDescriptio: Newest first. Each row captures the from / to stages, the timestamp, and the optional move comment.
products.edit.workflow.noAssignees: No assignees yet. Use the Assign button to delegate review or approval.
products.edit.relations.addDesc: Link this product to another. Cross-sells and recommendations are reciprocal by default — both products see each other.
products.edit.relations.notesPlaceholder: Optional context (e.g. "goes well with the racing pants of this collection")
products.edit.relations.deleteBody: Both sides of the link are removed if a reciprocal exists.
products.edit.relations.outgoingEmpty: No relations yet. Add a cross-sell or up-sell to surface this product alongside others on PDPs.
products.edit.relations.incomingDesc: Other products that link to this one. Read-only here — edit them from the source product.
products.edit.relations.typeDesc.CROSS_S: Mutual links surfaced on the PDP — "customers also bought." Reciprocal by default.
products.edit.relations.typeDesc.UPSELL: Higher-tier alternatives. Surfaced as "step up to…" on the PDP. Not usually reciprocal.
products.edit.relations.typeDesc.ACCESSO: Things that go with this product (mounts, replacement filters, lens caps).
products.edit.relations.typeDesc.REPLACE: Discontinued? Point shoppers at the modern equivalent.
products.edit.relations.aiRankTooltip: Re-rank candidates using Gemini AI — semantic product understanding beyond brand/price heuristics.
products.edit.relations.suggestTooltip: Surface ranked candidate products to relate as {type} based on brand / type / price tier matches.
products.edit.relations.suggestDesc: Heuristic ranking on top of the catalog: same brand (+30), same product type (+25), similar price tier (+20), has image (+10), has description (+10), listed on channels (+5). Pick what looks right; the operator decides.
products.edit.relations.suggestEmpty: No candidates with overlap on brand / type / price tier. Try a different relation type or pick manually via the search above.
products.edit.relations.suggestNoReason: Catalog fallback (no overlap on brand / type / price)
products.edit.inventory.thresholdHint: Low-stock alert fires when total available drops below {threshold}. Adjust on Master Data → Pricing Rules.
products.edit.inventory.byLocationDesc: On-hand vs reserved per warehouse / FBA / 3PL location. Available = on-hand − reserved.
products.edit.inventory.byLocationEmpty: No stock levels recorded — this product has never been received into any location.
products.edit.inventory.byChannelDesc: How much stock each marketplace currently sees. Buffer subtracted from available before publish; ATP is what the channel API was last told.
products.edit.inventory.reservationsDesc: Stock currently held for in-flight orders, transfers, or holds. Released automatically when the order ships, the transfer commits, or the expiry passes.
products.edit.inventory.movementsDesc: Append-only ledger of every receipt, ship, adjustment, and transfer. Full history in /fulfillment/stock.
products.edit.images.title: Master images
products.edit.images.emptyHint: Click to upload or drag files here
products.edit.images.noMain: No MAIN image set — set one image to type "Main" so channels pick the primary photo.
products.edit.images.tooFew: Only {count} image(s) — most channels require at least 3 for full coverage.
products.edit.images.tip1: Drag images to reorder. The first MAIN image is used as the primary listing photo.
products.edit.images.tip2: Channel-specific image overrides are managed on the /images page (link in header).
products.edit.images.tip3: Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Min 500×500px; 2000×2000px recommended.
products.edit.seo.title: SEO & metadata
products.edit.seo.schemaOrgHint: Paste this snippet into your storefront <head> to enable rich results in Google search.
products.edit.compliance.ppeHint: Select the PPE category under EU Directive 2016/425. Motorcycle helmets and body armour are Cat III — they require annual surveillance by a Notified Body.
products.edit.compliance.hazmatFlag: This product is classified as dangerous goods (ADR / IATA)
products.edit.compliance.noCerts: No certificates attached yet. Add a CE marking or EN 13595 certificate to unlock compliance status for EU channels.
products.edit.locales.masterDesc: Source of truth. Edit master fields on the Master Data tab; channels fall back here when a translation is missing.
products.edit.locales.masterHint: Channels and listings inherit from this when a translation isn't present.
products.edit.locales.addDesc: Pick a locale to seed an empty translation. Channels mapped to that language will start picking it up immediately on next publish.
products.edit.locales.cannotAddPrimary: Master locale cannot be added as a translation — edit it on Master Data.
products.edit.locales.empty: No translations yet. Pick a locale above to start translating.
products.edit.locales.aiTranslateTooltip: Translate every field for {locale} via Gemini. Result is marked unreviewed; review before relying on it for public copy.
products.edit.locales.aiAllSkipped: All fields skipped — provider returned empty content. Try again or check master copy.
products.edit.locales.bulkTooltip: Run AI translate on every missing locale ({count}). Each one is processed in turn so the provider doesn't rate-limit; results land progressively.
products.edit.locales.bulkAllFailed: All locales failed: {locales}. Check provider config and retry.
products.edit.locales.deleteBody: Channels mapped to this locale will fall back to master. The row is hard-deleted; recreate by adding the locale again.

recover.title: Recover listing
recover.empty.noListings: This product has no channel listings yet — nothing to recover. Use the wizard to publish first.
recover.newSku.help: Must be unique across your catalog. Amazon enforces a ~30 day cooldown before a deleted SKU can be reused, so a fresh SKU avoids that wait.
recover.error.unreachableDetail: The recovery flow couldn't load because the API server is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
recover.action.REPUBLISH_IN_PLACE.title: Republish in place
recover.action.REPUBLISH_IN_PLACE.summar: Re-send the current payload without deleting. Keeps ASIN, SKU and reviews. Best first attempt for most errors.
recover.action.DELETE_RELIST_SAME.title: Delete & relist (same ASIN + SKU)
recover.action.DELETE_RELIST_SAME.summar: Removes the listing then recreates it with the same identifiers. Reviews stay attached to the ASIN. Risk: SKU cooldown on Amazon.
recover.action.SAME_ASIN_NEW_SKU.title: Same ASIN, new SKU
recover.action.SAME_ASIN_NEW_SKU.summary: Recreates the listing under a fresh SKU but reuses the existing ASIN. Avoids the SKU cooldown; reviews are preserved on the ASIN.
recover.action.NEW_ASIN_SAME_SKU.title: New ASIN, same SKU
recover.action.NEW_ASIN_SAME_SKU.summary: Lets Amazon mint a new ASIN against the same SKU. Reviews on the old ASIN are lost. Useful when the existing ASIN is permanently blocked.
recover.action.FULL_RESET.title: Full reset (new ASIN + new SKU)
recover.action.FULL_RESET.summary: Cleanest break — new identifiers everywhere. All reviews lost. Use only when both ASIN and SKU are toxic.

publishDashboard.title: Publish to channels
publishDashboard.description: Push an asset to Amazon, eBay, Shopify, and WooCommerce in one operator pass. Fire results land in AuditLog so the publish history survives across sessions.
publishDashboard.sandboxTitle: All channels are sandbox by default
publishDashboard.sandboxBody: Publish calls record fake channel-side IDs in audit logs. Flip CHANNEL_PUBLISH_<CHANNEL>=live (per channel) or CHANNEL_PUBLISH_MODE=live (all) once credentials are configured. The badge next to each channel shows its current mode.
